title: Nephrodium lugubre

This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Nephrodium lugubre include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
